headline: Delta Air Lines Reworks Costs And Service As Spirit Exit Reshapes Competition
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) is adjusting its operations in response to higher jet fuel costs linked to geopolitical tensions. The company is reacting to industry disruption following the collapse of Spirit Airlines and the resulting shake-up in US capacity. Delta plans to end free snacks and drinks on flights under 350 miles, signaling a change in its short haul in flight service model. For you as an investor, NYSE:DAL now sits at the center of several industry shifts at once. Delta runs a...
